AWS.description: Settings for configuring the AWS SDK for .NET

AllowAutoRedirect.description: This flag controls if .NET HTTP infrastructure should follow redirection responses (e.g. HTTP 307 - temporary redirect).

AuthenticationRegion.description: Overrides the region used when computing AWS signature.

AuthSchemePreference.description: List of preferred authentication schemes in priority order.

BufferSize.description: The BufferSize controls the buffer used to read in from input streams and write out to the request.

ClientAppId.description: ClientAppId is an optional application specific identifier that can be set. When set it will be appended to the User-Agent header of every request in the form of app/{ClientAppId}.

ConnectTimeout.description: The ConnectTimeout property controls the timeout when establishing a connection. The units for the property is milliseconds

DefaultsMode.description: Sets the mode that SDK should use when setting default values for settings.

DisableHostPrefixInjection.description: Host prefix injection prefixes the service endpoint with request members from APIs which use this feature.

DisableLogging.description: If true logging for this client will be disabled.

DisableRequestCompression.description: Controls whether request payloads are automatically compressed for supported operations.

EndpointDiscoveryCacheLimit.description: The maximum number of discovered endpoints that can be stored within the cache for the client.

EndpointDiscoveryEnabled.description: The flag indicating if endpoint discovery should be enabled or disabled for operations that are not required to use endpoint discovery.

FastFailRequests.description: Under Adaptive retry mode the SDK will use fail fast logic.

HttpClientCacheSize.description: Controls the number of HttpClients cached for service clients.

IgnoreConfiguredEndpointUrls.description: If set to true the SDK will ignore the configured endpointUrls in the config file or in the environment variables.

LogMetrics.description: Flag on whether to log metrics for service calls.

LogResponse.description: If this property is set to true, the service response is logged.

MaxConnectionsPerServer.description: This property is used to set the MaxConnectionsPerServer on the matching property on the underlying HttpClient to make service calls.

MaxErrorRetry.description: How many retry HTTP requests an SDK should make for a single SDK operation invocation before giving up.

MaxStaleConnectionRetries.description: Maximum number of times the SDK will retry requests that fail due to stale pooled HTTP connections.

Profile.description: The AWS credential profiles the service client should be configured for.

ProfilesLocation.description: The path to where the AWS credential profile is configured. By default this is configured at ~/.aws/credentials.

ProgressUpdateInterval.description: The interval at which progress update events are raised for upload operations.

Region.description: The AWS region the service client should be configured for.

RequestMinCompressionSizeBytes.description: Minimum size in bytes that a request body should be to trigger compression.

ResignRetries.description: Flag on whether to resign requests on retry or not.

RetryMode.description: The current mode in use for request retries and influences the value returned from MaxErrorRetry.

ServiceURL.description: Overrides the region for the service clients and sends requests to the indicated url.

SessionName.description: The session name for the assumed session using the SessionRoleArn.

SessionRoleArn.description: If set this role will be assumed using the resolved AWS credentials.

SigV4aSigningRegionSet.description: List of AWS regions for SigV4a multi-region signing.

ThrottleRetries.description: Enables the SDK to use intelligent throttle retry logic.

Timeout.description: The timeout that is set on the HttpClient Timeout for configuring the wait time for requests time out.

UseAlternateUserAgentHeader.description: If true the service client will use the x-amz-user-agent header instead of the User-Agent header to report version and environment information to the AWS service. This is commonly used in Blazor WebAssembly applications.

UseDualstackEndpoint.description: Configures the endpoint calculation for a service to go to a dual stack (ipv6 enabled) endpoint for the configured region.

UseFIPSEndpoint.description: Configures the endpoint calculation to go to a FIPS endpoint for the configured region.

UseHttp.description: If true clients will attempt to use HTTP protocol if the target endpoint supports it.

AbortOnConnectFail.description: Gets or sets whether connect/configuration timeouts should be explicitly notified via a TimeoutException.

AllowAdmin.description: Indicates whether admin operations should be allowed.

AsyncTimeout.description: Specifies the time in milliseconds that the system should allow for asynchronous operations (defaults to SyncTimeout).

UseImplicitAutoPattern.description: Indicates whether channels should use 'StackExchange.Redis.RedisChannel.PatternMode.Auto' when no 'StackExchange.Redis.RedisChannel.PatternMode' is specified; this is enabled by default, but can be disabled to avoid unexpected wildcard scenarios.

CheckCertificateRevocation.description: A Boolean value that specifies whether the certificate revocation list is checked during authentication.

ClientName.description: The client name to use for all connections.

ConfigCheckSeconds.description: Check configuration every n seconds (every minute by default).

ConfigurationChannel.description: Channel to use for broadcasting and listening for configuration change notification.

ConnectRetry.description: The number of times to repeat the initial connect cycle if no servers respond promptly.

ConnectTimeout.description: Specifies the time in milliseconds that should be allowed for connection (defaults to 5 seconds unless SyncTimeout is higher).

DefaultDatabase.description: Specifies the default database to be used when calling 'StackExchange.Redis.ConnectionMultiplexer.GetDatabase(System.Int32,System.Object)' without any parameters.

HeartbeatConsistencyChecks.description: Whether to enable ECHO checks on every heartbeat to ensure network stream consistency. This is a rare measure to react to any potential network traffic drops ASAP, terminating the connection.

HeartbeatInterval.description: Controls how often the connection heartbeats. A heartbeat includes: - Evaluating if any messages have timed out. - Evaluating connection status (checking for failures). - Sending a server message to keep the connection alive if needed.

HighIntegrity.description: A Boolean value that specifies whether to use per-command validation of strict protocol validity. This sends an additional command after EVERY command which incurs measurable overhead.

IncludeDetailInExceptions.description: Whether exceptions include identifiable details (key names, additional .Data annotations).

IncludePerformanceCountersInExceptions.description: Whether exceptions include performance counter details.

KeepAlive.description: Specifies the time in seconds at which connections should be pinged to ensure validity. -1 Defaults to 60 Seconds.

LibraryName.description: Gets or sets the library name to use for CLIENT SETINFO lib-name calls to Redis during handshake. Defaults to "SE.Redis".

Password.description: The password to use to authenticate with the server.

Proxy.description: Type of proxy to use (if any); for example 'StackExchange.Redis.Proxy.Twemproxy'.

ResolveDns.description: Indicates whether endpoints should be resolved via DNS before connecting. If enabled the ConnectionMultiplexer will not re-resolve DNS when attempting to re-connect after a connection failure.

ServiceName.description: The service name used to resolve a service via sentinel.

SetClientLibrary.description: Gets or sets whether the library should identify itself by library-name/version when possible.

Ssl.description: Indicates whether the connection should be encrypted.

SslHost.description: The target-host to use when validating SSL certificate; setting a value here enables SSL mode.

SslProtocols.description: Configures which SSL/TLS protocols should be allowed.  If not set, defaults are chosen by the .NET framework.

SyncTimeout.description: Specifies the time in milliseconds that the system should allow for synchronous operations (defaults to 5 seconds).

TieBreaker.description: Tie-breaker used to choose between primaries (must match the endpoint exactly).

User.description: The username to use to authenticate with the server.

ConfigurationOptions.description: The options relevant to a set of redis connections.

ConnectionString.description: Gets or sets the comma-delimited configuration string used to connect to the Redis server.

DisableAutoActivation.description: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether auto activation is disabled or not.

DisableHealthChecks.description: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the Redis health check is disabled or not.

DisableTracing.description: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

Redis.description: Provides the client configuration settings for connecting to a Redis server.
